title: Beehiiv vs Sendinblue (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Compare Beehiiv and Sendinblue email marketing tools. See pricing, features, and which platform suits your needs.
intro: Beehiiv and Sendinblue (now Brevo) serve different segments of the email marketing market. Beehiiv specializes in newsletter publishing with monetization features, while Sendinblue excels at transactional emails, SMS, and CRM integration. Your choice depends on whether you prioritize newsletter growth or multi-channel business communications.
choose_a_if: You're launching a newsletter and want built-in monetization options
You prefer a platform focused specifically on newsletter growth and distribution
You value an affiliate program with 50% first-year commissions
choose_b_if: You need SMS, WhatsApp, and transactional email capabilities
You operate an ecommerce business requiring multi-channel communication
You want a generous free tier with 100,000 subscribers and integrated CRM

faq.a: Neither is objectively better—it depends on your use case. Beehiiv excels for newsletter publishers seeking monetization, while Sendinblue offers broader capabilities for businesses needing email, SMS, WhatsApp, and CRM in one platform. Beehiiv has a higher G2 rating (4.7 vs 4.5), but Sendinblue provides more comprehensive tools at a lower entry price.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, Beehiiv or Sendinblue?
faq.a: Sendinblue is cheaper overall. Its free tier supports 100,000 subscribers compared to Beehiiv's 2,500, and paid plans start at $25/month versus Beehiiv's $39/month. However, Beehiiv's pricing is justified by its newsletter-specific features like monetization and referral programs.

faq.q: Can I switch from Sendinblue to Beehiiv?
faq.a: Yes, you can export your subscriber list and migrate to Beehiiv. Most email platforms support CSV exports that can be imported into Beehiiv. However, you'll lose Sendinblue-specific features like SMS and WhatsApp capabilities unless Beehiiv adds these in the future.
